steps.title: Identify the temporal clause structure
steps.content: The blank appears in a dependent clause introduced by “By the time,” and the main clause uses past perfect tense (“had drastically increased”), showing the increase was already complete at that point.

steps.title: Apply the sequence of tenses
steps.content:
The sequence of tenses rule requires simple past when the main clause is in past perfect, which is what “ascended” provides.

The other three options use future, present, and present progressive tenses respectively, each violating tense consistency.

That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
